name: sylph
description: Auto-orchestrates branch/commit/PR per task boundary; reads CI status across 10 hosts and 10 CI systems. Enchanted-plugins Phase 4 plugin #21.
author: enchanter-ai

plugins.name: commit-intelligence
plugins.description: W1 — Myers-Diff Conventional Classifier. Drafts + validates Conventional Commits messages via Sonnet→Haiku pipeline.

plugins.name: boundary-segmenter
plugins.description: W2 — Jaccard-Cosine Boundary Segmentation (defining engine). Clusters PostToolUse(Edit|Write) events into task boundaries.

plugins.name: branch-workflow
plugins.description: W3 — Workflow-Pattern Classifier. Detects branching model per (sub)tree and drives branch creation.

plugins.name: pr-lifecycle
plugins.description: W4 — Path-History Reviewer Routing. Idempotent PR state machine + reviewer ranking from blame + CODEOWNERS + Crow availability.

plugins.name: capability-memory
plugins.description: Provider capability registry — the host 'memory'. Hardcoded baseline + nightly CI refresh + GitLab self-managed runtime probe.

plugins.name: ci-reader
plugins.description: Read-only CI status + log streaming across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins, Buildkite, Drone/Woodpecker, Tekton, ArgoCD/WixieCD.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. Declares the other 8 as dependencies so one install pulls in the whole chain.

plugins.name: weaver-gate
plugins.description: Destructive-op decision-gate for git. Inspects every Bash invocation; routes force-push, history rewrite, branch/tag deletion, clean -fdx, and merge-queue bypass through a confirmation surface before execution.

plugins.name: weaver-learning
plugins.description: W5 — Gauss Learning (Sylph). Per-developer preference persistence via exponential moving averages with Emu-A4 atomic serialization. Tracks commit-style (scope rate, body rate, types), branch-naming conventions, PR turnaround, reviewer overrides, W2 corrections. Priors flow back to W1/W2/W3/W4 after the bootstrap sample floor.
